goals.why: To improve social connections and communication skills
goals.details: Steps: 1. Start Small 2. Join Social Activities 3. Listen Actively 4. Initiate Plans 5. Practice Consistently

goals.why: To improve overall health and well-being, and to be more present and engaged in social interactions
goals.details: Steps: 1. Identify triggers 2. Seek support 3. Replace with healthy habits 4. Stay accountable | Triggers include boredom. Need to find healthy alternatives to cope with boredom. | Identified triggers include boredom and feeling withdrawn

goals.goal: Update code remotely for reminders system on Raspberry Pi
goals.why: To be able to make changes from school while Raspberry Pi is running at home
